item.title: Edgar Morin, ‘Grandfather’ of French Intellectuals, Dies at 104 - The New York Times
item.description: Edgar Morin, ‘Grandfather’ of French Intellectuals, Dies at 104  The New York TimesFrench sociologist, philosopher and intellectual provocateur Edgar Morin has died aged 104  Le Monde.frFrench intellectual and inventor of 'cinema verité' Edgar Morin dies at 104  France 24Edgar Morin and Complexity: Understanding the World Without Reducing It  AtalayarCDK-F: Kurdish people have lost a great friend, humanity has lost a great conscience  ANF | Articles
